MOS.sentence: Mosaic is sitting near rock bottom of its trading range, which often means it's due for a bounce when fertilizer demand picks up.

ASML.sentence: ASML dropped over 3% today as investors are betting the company's sky-high valuation will come down as it grows into its new advanced machines.

SMH.sentence: The semiconductor basket didn't have any data today.

ENB.sentence: Enbridge is up slightly and its dividend yield looks normal compared to government bonds, so the pipeline business is ticking along steadily.

ETHA.sentence: Ethereum is starting to outperform Bitcoin, which usually signals investors are moving beyond just the biggest cryptocurrency into alternatives.

GLNCY.sentence: Glencore is down a bit today and its earnings look thin right now, probably because commodity prices aren't giving the trading business much to work with.

IBIT.sentence: Bitcoin is trading about 19% below its recent average, which after a big run-up earlier this year suggests it's finding a floor.

KOF.sentence: Coca-Cola FEMSA is holding steady as the Mexican peso stays stable despite hints that interest rates there might come down.

PBR.A.sentence: Petrobras is up slightly as its offshore oil production keeps climbing with new floating platforms coming online.

AMKBY.sentence: Maersk is up nearly 1% today, and its ships are priced at about 40% less than what it would cost to build them new, which makes it look cheap.

SPY.sentence: The S&P 500 is down slightly today and sitting near the top of its recent range, which suggests the broad market might be getting a bit stretched.
